title: THIS VIDEO CONTAINS KK SLIDER
description:
XD Sorry... I couldn't resist.

Credit goes to BreakfastisCoffee for helping me figure out how to split notes into seperate channels using Anvil Studio... XD

Made using a soundfont ripped from the AC:WW rom, which I've compiled and uploaded for you to use here:

https://www.dropbox.com/s/e7090fg2g8730wt/KK%20Slider%20Soundfont.zip

Enjoy!

EDIT: Due to popular demand, here's the MP3.
http://www.datafilehost.com/download-d027540b.html
